title.en: China-to-Nauru Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入瑙鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入諾魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against NUC interconnection requirements, ministry energy-sector oversight, and donor-funded project specifications, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 utility-interface, IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC evidence, 240/415 V 50 Hz grid settings, and coastal salt-mist derating considerations — versus China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与瑙鲁NUC标准、ministry能源监管、NUC并网要求、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727公用电网接口、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC证据、240/415 V 50 Hz电网参数及沿海盐雾降额因素——对比中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與諾魯NUC標準、ministry能源監管、NUC併網要求、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727公用電網介面、IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 EMC證據、240/415 V 50 Hz電網參數及沿海鹽霧降額因素——對比中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NUC interconnection determination, ministry energy-sector approval, donor-funded project technical approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Nauru standards, ministry rules, NUC connection requirements, project-owner specifications, and coastal environmental requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NUC标准裁定、ministry能源监管批准、NUC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行瑙鲁标准、ministry规则、NUC接入要求、项目业主规格及沿海环境要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NUC標準裁定、ministry能源監管批准、NUC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行諾魯標準、ministry規則、NUC接入要求、項目業主規格及沿海環境要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Nauru, the key practical gaps are: (1) confirm NUC and project standard requirements and any product conformity route before import; (2) obtain ministry and NUC project-level grid-connection requirements before shipment; (3) provide IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence; (4) provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; (5) provide IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; and (6) validate firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, thermal ratings, and corrosion controls for Nauru's 240/415 V, 50 Hz coastal island grid. Nauru shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. China GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964 evidence is not automatically accepted as Nauru evidence without supplementary IEC and project-specific review.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口瑙鲁时，主要实际差距包括：（1）进口前确认NUC标准采纳情况及任何产品合格评定路径；（2）出货前取得ministry和NUC的项目级并网要求；（3）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（4）提供IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（5）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（6）针对瑙鲁240/415 V、50 Hz沿海岛屿电网验证固件、保护阈值、重连延迟、热额定值和防腐蚀措施。瑙鲁与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基准。中国GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964证据在没有补充IEC证据和项目专项审查的情况下，不能自动作为瑙鲁证据。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口諾魯時，主要實際差距包括：（1）進口前確認NUC標準採納情況及任何產品合格評定路徑；（2）出貨前取得ministry和NUC的項目級併網要求；（3）提供IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（4）提供IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（5）提供IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（6）針對諾魯240/415 V、50 Hz沿海島嶼電網驗證韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲、熱額定值和防腐蝕措施。諾魯與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基準。中國GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964證據在沒有補充IEC證據和項目專項審查的情況下，不能自動作為諾魯證據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
